When Oliver tells Simon about a bargain in the sales at a shop, the pair go to extraordinary lengths to be first to buy it - and that includes Simon preparing to sleep out in the street.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Stan and his family decide to buy a colour TV, but there is a problem with the disposal of their old set.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carl worries about Donald when he has a funny turn and refuses to go to the hospital. Val accuses Pearl of causing the fire, and the villagers learn about Pollard's plans.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Terry confronts Matthew about the apartment development - warning the businessman he will contest the plans. Marlon is offered a new job, and Carl tells Donald to take it easy.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail grills David about the treatment he is receiving. She shares her disappointment that he didn’t call on her birthday. Roger tells Leanne the Italian will need to be gutted to even become a bar. Jerry locks himself out of his car outside the offender’s centre. Mel has to bring him the spare keys, in her police car. She is not amused. Gail tells David she thinks a lot of him for facing up to his punishment. Paul gets a new job but it’s not as good a position as he was hoping for. Fiz has her hair done and everyone thinks it is because Kirk is back tomorrow.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kirk arrives back on the Street. Fiz fusses over Chesney and tries to hide her dismay at his ‘meaningful’ glances. Chesney is elated to see Kirk back. Leanne’s insurance pay out comes through – she has been granted nearly everything she has claimed for. Dan warns her to pay Paul speedily. Bill and Gail notice Audrey is distracted. Harry discusses his divorce over the phone as Dan and Leanne decide to move in together. Harry is pleased Dan will be moving out of the flat. Paul is unenthused about his new job. Jack offers money to buy a new restaurant. Molly realises that Paul has feelings for Leanne.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length drama following the exploits of the irascible Detective Inspector Frost. There are threats, deaths, arson and a staff shortage at the police station, but anything has to be better than staying at home with an unwelcome guest for Frost.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick interrupts an armed robbery which is taking place at the Aidensfield Arms and ends up locked in the cellar with George and Greengrass - during the night, Greengrass drinks himself silly and ends up giving Nick tip-offs about recent offences in the area. A particular mystery begins to unfold due to this event, and there appears to be a cover-up of a local death as well...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Disaster strikes as local farmer Reg Manston suspects his cows to have foot-and-mouth disease and Nick and fellow officers are forced to have the whole village on lockdown to the dismay of local businesses - when another farmer is suspected of starting the outbreak and discoveries are made that imply that an affair was the actual spread of the disease, emotions run high as the situation ends in fatal consequences.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When one of the world's rarest orchids is smuggled illegally into Midsomer Malham, it triggers a catalogue of passion, jealousy and death - first retired classics teacher and secret sexual siren Madeline Villiers is poisoned with hemlock, then compulsive collector Henry Plummer is strangled and his beloved orchids destroyed. Barnaby and Troy must find the delicate yellow Roth plant and root out who is prepared to spend hundreds of thousands of pounds - and commit murder - just to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon and Val argue when the chef learns that they didn't win the Pub of the Year competition. Sam offers to rebuild the factory, and Mel asks Ashley for time with Arthur.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mel gives Greg an ultimatum when he confronts her about Arthur. Marlon prepares to contact the rival pub about the job offer but Donna urges him to reconsider.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne tries to reason with Paul about his threat, but Dan decides to call his bluff. A remorseful David receives a visit from Audrey, and Kirk introduces his girlfriend to Fiz.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne and Dan realise they're up to their necks in trouble as Paul heads off to the police station. Liam spends the night on Carla's sofa and Audrey finally arranges to meet Ted.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Fine Young Cannibals frontman Roland Gift makes a guest appearance in the drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. A black soldier called Ken Marston who is on exercises in the area is getting bullied by his racist sergeant - Sergeant Nichols follows Marston during the exercises and intends to shoot him as reports of racist abuse have been submitted to Nichols' superiors, but the confrontation between the two ends dramatically on a cliff top with one going on the run. Nick has to capture this man and figure out exactly what happened - meanwhile, Kate is in the middle of a social care case where she has been mistakenly blamed for reporting a mother to the authorities.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Rosie, the wife of local villain Terry Tinniswood, takes an overdose and Nick and Kate are left minding her children - upon recovery, Rosie tells Nick that her husband is in jail for a crime that he didn't commit. Nick investigates the claim and discovers that his predecessors may not have been as honourable as remembered - meanwhile, Phil is to marry his girlfriend who claims to be pregnant, but he later finds that she has been seeing someone else and the plot thickens when he discovers who it is.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The death of wealthy aristocrat Sir Freddy Butler brings Barnaby and Jones to the privileged surroundings of Haddington Hall amid rumours abounding and the presence of his two ex-wives raising suspicions - could Sir Freddy have found the Haddington family emeralds which once belonged to Catherine the Great? Freddy appears to have died of a heart attack, but the detectives close in on his family when his will disappears and his lawyer is killed.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. DCI Barnaby uncovers a seedy world of adultery and deceit within an affluent rural community when the body of arrogant local beauty Melissa Townsend is discovered by the pool at her manor house.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective drama series. A particularly dangerous rapist is at large on Frost's patch and Superintendent Mullett - who is worried about public and press perceptions as usual - puts WPC Wallace on the case to add a 'woman's insight' into the investigations. When Frost then tries to trap the rapist, he exposes WPC Wallace to danger - Frost has been out on a limb before, but never this far...

Nick investigates the claim and discovers that his predecessors may not have been as honourable as remembered - meanwhile, Phil is to marry his girlfriend who claims to be pregnant, but he later finds that she has been seeing someone else and the plot thickens when he discovers who it is.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate a death in Midsomer Mere, a place where villagers seem to have the ability to predict future events - John Ransom's head was covered in scorch marks, the result of his brother Max's research into second sight. Is his death due to a pub brawl with his brother-in-law Ben Kirby over plans for a baptism, or is he a casualty of the bizarre experiments? In the battle between faith and science, even Barnaby thinks he has seen a man somewhere before... it's time to delve into the village's history for clues.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Doug is fearful that Ashley's considering giving Arthur back to the Dolands. Bob and Viv make a decision on guardianship of the twins if they're both sent to jail.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: A hung-over Liam makes his way home to Maria, but her fury turns to anguish when she receives devastating news at the hospital. Meanwhile, the police question Dan and Leanne.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria struggles to tell Liam the news as she tries to come to terms with what's happened. Roy is flummoxed by Becky's change of heart over Jason, and a nervous Audrey meets Ted.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick and Kate fall out when an old boyfriend of hers turns up - soon after his arrival, the former flame becomes the prime suspect in a hit-and-run incident and Nick is forced to keep him in the area while it is investigated. Meanwhile, the local bank reports a suspicious female customer and Greengrass sells a chunk of moorland to the Ministry of Defence before promptly treating himself to a flashy pink Chrysler Imperial...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick investigates the case of a baby stolen from its pram outside a shop - the prime suspects are a group of hippies who were busking nearby, but the child's grandmother is also under suspicion.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. When wealthy betting shop magnate Alun Wilmott is shot and killed in front of his wife and daughter during a terrifying home invasion, it's assumed that he is the unlucky victim of a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A reclusive couple are found dead after being victims of a supposedly botched burglary which shocks the occupants of the village of Dunstan - when a guest is murdered at the wedding at one of Jones' oldest friends, could this spate of killings be connected to a mystery of a fatal road accident and the disappearance of a teenager 20 years ago?

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A vicious attack on a widow and her daughter demands that Frost turn his attention to catching the murderer - as he uncovers the lies and deceit of those involved with the murdered woman, a manhunt begins for a serial killer.

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: One last adventure for the medieval sleuthing monk of Shrewsbury who investigates foul deeds against a backdrop of unrest in town and country. The corpse of an old man is discovered in a sack at the Abbey and Cadfael believes that the man was murdered - among the suspects is a group of pilgrims that contains two thieves, so Cadfael imprisons them to draw out the killer.

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the day's games in the Football League, including Huddersfield v Cardiff, Bradford v Plymouth, Northampton v Barnsley and Rotherham v Luton in League One.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. A vast and brooding lake that hides a dark history lies on the Canada-US border - it's an ancient and sacred site for Native Americans, but something has recently risen up from the depths to attack swimmers and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. In a journey that takes him to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest, extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to catch the most ancient river monster of his career.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Meet the family firm making traditional haggis - the national dish of Scotland which might not have come from Scotland after all - learn what goes into making a set of bowls fit for a champion, discover how one firm makes the wheelbarrows that helped rebuild Britain, and meet a team making pairs of classic brogues that are in demand around the world.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard. In this episode, Henry takes a wild ride through Gran Canaria - back home, Henry and Sam track down a rare 1970s Chopper to restore, and Henry visits the Morgan factory to learn about their iconic three wheelers and what they're like to ride.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Acclaimed actor Sean Bean stars in these dramas set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain - fast-moving and hard-hitting action adventures based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels bring all the danger and romance of one of the bloodiest periods of warfare to our screens.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. Portugal 1812 - the Spanish village of Adrados has been overtaken by a horde of French, Spanish and British deserters who have taken two Englishwomen hostage. Much to the disgust of Sir Augustus Farthingdale, Captain Sharpe is assigned the task of delivering the ransom...

programme.desc: Live coverage from the NHL as the New York Rangers take on the Florida Panthers at Madison Square Garden. [S]

programme.title: Nijinsky's Triple Crown
programme.desc: A short sports film about the legendary racehorse. [S]

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack hosts another episode of the second series of the show. The 1 Club is the ultimate leveller - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes, because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts... they're all about logic and common sense. It doesn't matter if you're 15 or 50 - this is the quiz that the whole family can play together. 100 contestants begin every show, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.title: American Psycho
programme.desc: A disturbingly dark horror adaptation of Bret Easton Ellis' provocative 1991 novel of the same name. The late 1980s: Wall Street investment banking executive Patrick Bateman travels among a closed network of 'beautiful people' who are vain, narcissistic, egomaniacal and competitive. While Patrick may be like them, he realises that these people are also masking someone or something inhuman in nature... and sets out in disgust to rid the world of the elitists who flaunt these filthy flaws.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Action-packed drama series about two criminal intelligence agents. The team are assigned to protect a visiting American diplomat from a renowned hitman who is holding a young girl captive and has the dignitary in his sights, but the hitman then appears to give up the chase after one assassination attempt only to turn up at CI5 headquarters. Was the ambassador his real target?

programme.title: Lost Car Rescue
programme.desc: Reality series following an ambitious team of classic car hunters as they delve deep into Canada's northern wilderness to recover rare vehicles rumoured to be hiding in the bush. In this episode, Matt and his team are thousands of kilometres from home as they embark on their most ambitious adventure yet and get creative to make an historic rescue.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from fixtures in the 1984/85 football season - highlights include a tightly contested match at Highbury between Arsenal and Aston Villa, a six-goal thriller as Grimsby Town play Wolves, and a West Country derby as Bristol City face local rivals Bristol Rovers.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from fixtures in the 1984/85 football season - highlights include a tight contest between Everton and Sheffield Wednesday, a late goal at Highfield Road as Coventry City face title contenders Tottenham Hotspur, and a seven-goal thriller between Leeds United and Wimbledon.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: This Island Isn't Big Enough...: Classic US action drama series. Thomas, TC and Higgins search for Rick and a boatload of passengers who have gone missing at sea during a cruise. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep13

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Multi-talented actress Swoosie Kurtz guest stars in this episode of the classic US detective drama. Theo has another run-in with bounty hunter Salathiel Harris when he returns to New York in pursuit of a bail jumper.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. Ken tries to be a good Samaritan - but lands himself in trouble - when he tries to help a group of tenants being evicted from their flats by a ruthless landlord.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough 1970s police drama series. Carter winds up behind bars when he attempts to find the proceeds of a jewellery robbery.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Rusty is back and hopes that his mum's popcorn bowl will be enough protection against deadly new flipper Blip, and Bloodsport faces Whiplash in a ferocious main event.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is shot and left for dead by a hitman who hired him to investigate a bogus missing persons case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A Native American desperate for work is mistaken for a burglar by a company president and ends up accidentally killing him, an act that only proves to be the first in a run of misfortune for the luckless murderer.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. A neighbour of Ken asks him to investigate a sudden change in character in her son, and Harry attempts to learn Norwegian in preparation for the arrival of some visitors from Norway.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough 1970s police drama series. When Regan and Carter become involved in a plot to prevent a foreign head of state from gaining access to a prototype pill that could combat his worsening heart disease, comic legends Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise become involved as the Sweeney and the villains converge on a country club where the duo are performing.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about a loveable rogue. After being left in an industrial freezer, Terry looks for alternative employment and gets work helping out an old friend in the second-hand furniture business.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Acclaimed actor Sean Bean stars in these dramas set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain - fast-moving and hard-hitting action adventures based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels bring all the danger and romance of one of the bloodiest periods of warfare to our screens.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Iconic action drama. Codenamed Maverick, impetuous daredevil Navy ace Pete Mitchell is accepted into Top Gun, Miramar's elite fighter school - once there, the impulsive young pilot will have to do battle against other hotshot pilots including Iceman, a brilliant and highly-competitive fellow student. Maverick must give his all, but his father's mysterious and untimely demise still haunts him - will he be able to prove his worth to Charlie, the flying school's no-nonsense astrophysics instructor?

programme.title: Top Gun

Maverick must give his all, but his father's mysterious and untimely demise still haunts him - will he be able to prove his worth to Charlie, the flying school's no-nonsense astrophysics instructor?

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: Oscar-winning boxing drama. Rocky Balboa is a struggling boxer trying to make the big time and working as a debt collector for a pittance - when heavyweight champion Apollo Creed visits Philadelphia, his managers want to set up an exhibition match between Creed and a struggling boxer, touting the fight as a chance for a nobody to become a somebody. The match is supposed to be easily won by Creed, but someone forgets to tell Rocky as he sees this as his only shot at the big time...

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. Portugal 1812 - the Spanish village of Adrados has been overtaken by a horde of French, Spanish and British deserters who have taken two Englishwomen hostage. Much to the disgust of Sir Augustus Farthingdale, Captain Sharpe is assigned the task of delivering the ransom...

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? The 1 Club is the ultimate leveller - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes, because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts... they're all about logic and common sense. programme.desc: Fra 2022. En utmattet kinesiskamerikansk kvinne som trekkes inn i et vilt eventyr. Hun er den eneste som kan redde jorden, ved å utforske andre kloder og gå gjennom alle livene hun kunne ha levd.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: Fra 2002. Under den kalde krigen blir kapteinen Alexei Vostrykoy blir beordret til å overta kommandoen på atomubåten K-19, og gjøre den klar til sin jomfrureise. Lite vet kapteinen eller det lojale mannskapet om hva som er i vente.

programme.title: Kon-Tiki
programme.desc: Fra 2012. I 1947 krysset oppdageren Thor Heyerdahl Stillehavet i en flåte for å bevise at søramerikanerne kunne ha gjort det samme i førkolumbisk tid. Det blir en storslått reise.

programme.title: Moonfall
programme.desc: Fra 2022. En mystisk kraft slenger månen ut av kretsløp og sender den på kollisjonskurs mot jorden. Uker før verden ødelegges er NASA-sjefen overbevist om at hun har løsningen til å redde verden.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: Fra 2021. Etter mer enn tretti år som en av marinens beste flygere, er Pete Mitchell der han hører hjemme. Som en modig testpilot tøyer han strikken og unnviker forfremmelsen som vil sette ham på bakken.

programme.title: Open Range
programme.desc: Fra 2003. En tidligere revolvermann tvinges til å ta til våpen igjen når han og hans røktere trues av en korrupt landeier.

programme.title: 22 Bullets
programme.desc: Fra 2010. Etter en lang og vellykket karriere som profesjonell leiemorder lever Charly et stille og rolig liv med sin kone og to barn. Men en morgen blir han angrepet og etterlatt tilsynelatende død med 22 kuler i kroppen.

programme.title: U-571
programme.desc: Fra 2000. Andre verdenskrig. En amerikansk besetning får i oppdrag å ta seg ombord på fiendens ubåt for å stjele tyskernes beryktede kodemaskin, Enigma.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: Fra 2014. En spesialgruppe som får i oppdrag å raide gjemmestedet til et narkokartell, stjeler 10 millioner dollar av kartellets penger. Dette fører til en rekke mystiske dødsfall.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Fra 1986. Sammen med sin navigatør Goose blir Pete 'Maverick' Mitchell tatt opp ved marinens berømte eliteskole for blivende angrepsflyvere; Top Gun.

programme.title: Alle for én
programme.desc: Fra 2011. Fire menn, som var bestevenner som barn, har et stort problem: de befinner seg på ulike sider av loven.

programme.title: Alle for to
programme.desc: Fra 2013. Nikolai er ute på prøveløslatelse, mens brødrene Ralf og Timo holder på å planlegge et bankran som involverer den uvanlige kombinasjonen av usaltet smør, en slankekur og et helikopter.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Basert på tidenes største OL-skandale. Den lovende kunstløperen Tonya Hardings eksmann planlegger å brekke beinet på hennes konkurrent. Hvor mye visste egentlig Tonya?

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Fra 2015. Charlie Mortdecai er en kunstkjenner og livsnyter med dyre vaner. Han går med på å hjelpe den britiske etterretningstjenesten med å finne et maleri, som sies å gjemme på koden til gjemte nazi-millioner.

programme.title: What Happened to Monday
programme.desc: Fra 2017. For å forhindre overbefolkning får ingen ha mer enn ett barn, og en bestefar må redde de sju barnebarna. Men da én av jentene forsvinner, utvikler det seg til en desperat jakt for å finne henne.

programme.title: The Baker
programme.desc: Fra 2022. En stille baker med en broket fortid blir tvunget ut av sitt selvpålagte eksil når sønnen forsvinner. Han tvinges tilbake til det livet han trodde han hadde lagt bak seg, på leting etter sønnen sin.

programme.title: Alle for tre
programme.desc: Fra 2017. Da Ralf i siste øyeblikk tuller til Timos ellers så utmerkede utførte solarie-og-kobberkongle-kupp, og Arno uventet tar kvelden, må brødrene skynde seg til Italia for å få fingrene i Arnos antikke veteranmotorsykkel.

programme.title: Alle for Fire
programme.desc: Fra 2022. Alt er fryd og gammen hos brødrene Timo og Ralf. Timo har flyttet tilbake til Lonnie, men en dag oppdager han at Lonnies fremtidsplaner ikke involverer ham! Det fører til gjengens mest dumdristige kupp noensinne.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Alenemoren Stephanie blir venner med den glamorøse, fascinerende og mystiske Emily. Plutselig forsvinner Emily og Stephanie begynner å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: Fra 2011. Den dekorerte soldaten Colter Stevens våkner opp i kroppen til en ukjent mann på et av Chicagos pendlertog rett før hele toget blir sprengt av en bombe. Han er en del av et regjeringseksperiment kalt "Source Code"

programme.title: November Criminals
programme.desc: Fra 2017. To venner som skal begynne på college, faller for hverandre, men etter det mystiske drapet på en klassekamerat, må de trosse myndighetene for å avdekke sannheten.

programme.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
programme.desc: Fra 2023. Filmatisk adapsjon av dataspillet «Five Nights at Freddy’s» må en nattevakt stå vakt i en pizzeria i fem netter, der fire morderiske robotdyr har onde og morderiske planer.

programme.title: Bamse og dunderklokken
programme.desc: Fra 2018. I en brann blir Farmors lager av dunderklokker ødelagt. Det er den ingrediensen i Bamses dunderhonning som gjør at han blir verdens sterkeste bjørn. Bamse kan ikke lenger bli sterk, og nå er gode råd dyre.

programme.title: Panda & vennene - lamaalarm!
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Bjørnen Mic Mic og hans lojale venner venter på at storken skal komme med en liten bjørnunge - men i stedet kommer den med en lamababy! Denne uventede forvekslingen sender gjengen ut på et episk eventyr verden rundt.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Fra 2015. Alt ser ut til å gå strykende på Hotell Transylvania. Dracula har omsider løsnet på sine strenge "kun monstre"-regler, og har nå åpnet dørene for vanlige mennesker også.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Fra 2016. Poppy er verdens lykkeligste troll. Kvist er strake motsetningen. Sammen må de samarbeide og legge ut på et eventyr, for å redde vennene som er tatt til fange.

programme.title: Trolls: Verdensturné
programme.desc: Fra 2020. Poppy og Kvist oppdager at kongeriket deres bare er ett av seks riker med hver sin musikkstil -- funk, country, tekno, klassisk, pop og rock -- som en gang var forent i fred og harmoni.

programme.title: Trolls trommer sammen
programme.desc: Fra 2023. Poppy oppdager at Branch tidligere var med i boybandet BroZone sammen med brødrene sine; Floyd, John Dory, Spruce og Clay. Men når Floyd blir kidnappet, drar Branch og Poppy ut for å redde Floyd.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Fra 2015. Etter deres siste eksplosive feiltrinn sitter de igjen uten en ond leder og de små minionsene rammes av en dyp depresjon.

programme.desc: Fra 1997. Advokaten Fletcher Reede gir stadig sønnen sin løfter han ikke kan holde. Men når Fletcher glemmer sønnens bursdag, som han har lovet å komme til, får sønnen nok.

programme.desc: Fra 2019. Inspirert av den sanne skandalen om kvinnene som veltet mannen som skapte tidenes mektigste og mest omstridte medieimperium, Fox News.

programme.desc: Fra 2020. Før Alice dro til Eventyrland, og før Peter ble Peter Pan, var de bror og søster. Når deres eldste bror dør, må de velge mellom hjem og fantasi, noe som blir starten for deres ikoniske reiser.

programme.desc: Fra 2009. Ray og Candy krangler om et ulykkesoffers beslutning om å risikere døden for en operasjon som kan hjelpe ham til å gå igjen.

programme.title: Hawthorne
programme.desc: Fra 2009. Mens Christina og Tom kjemper for å redde staben fra en runde med ødeleggende budsjettkutt, setter en kritisk avgjørelse om behandlingen av et slagoffer Kelly på kant med Dr. Marshall.

programme.title: Hawthorne
programme.desc: Fra 2009. Mens Ray bekymrer seg for at møtet med dr. Marshall skaper problemer med Candy, blir Christina og Tom uenige om å inkludere hennes nære venn David Gendler i et forsøk med kreftmedisin.

programme.title: Hawthorne
programme.desc: Fra 2010. Etter at Richmond Trinity ble lagt ned, står sykepleier Christina Hawthorne overfor nye utfordringer ved det kriserammede James River Hospital.

programme.title: Hawthorne
programme.desc: Fra 2010. Samtidig som hun sliter med hva hun skal gjøre med Toms romantiske interesse, kjemper Christina mot enorme odds for å hjelpe en narkoman mor med å få en livreddende hjerteoperasjon.

programme.title: Jane the Virgin
programme.desc: Fra 2015. Etter å ha flyttet frem bryllupsdagen, opplever Jane og Michael at alle de nøye planlagte planene deres går i vasken. For å gjøre vondt verre er Jane misfornøyd med sin pågående hovedoppgave.

programme.title: Jane the Virgin
programme.desc: Fra 2016. Jane oppdager at Michael er blitt skutt, og hun må ta vanskelige valg. Mens Rafael passer på Mateo, hjelper Anezka politiet med etterforskningen.

programme.title: Jane the Virgin
programme.desc: Fra 2016. Når Rafael endelig innrømmer at han har kommet over Jane, blir samlivet deres satt på prøve når de krangler om hva som er den beste barnehagen for Mateo.

programme.title: Jane the Virgin
programme.desc: Fra 2016. Jane fortsetter å jobbe med avhandlingen sin, og hun bestemmer seg for å legge Albas fraseparerte søster til historien, til Albas store fortvilelse.

programme.title: Jane the Virgin
programme.desc: Fra 2016. Jane og Michaels innflyttingsfest i det nye hjemmet deres går i vasken da de oppdager at de blir kastet ut fordi de ikke har betalt husleien.

programme.title: Strong Medicine
programme.desc: Fra 2002. En pasients mystiske symptomer får Andy og Peter til å mistenke en forbrytelse, og Lu konfronteres med sine egne voldtektsminner når hun blir bedt om å kastrere en prøveløslatt seksualforbryter.

programme.title: Strong Medicine

programme.title: Strong Medicine
programme.desc: Fra 2002. Samtidig som de kjemper om å forløse den første babyen på nyåret, blir Lus unge kreftpasient arrestert for å være terrorist, mens Andy behandler en leddgiktrammet kvinne som trenger hendene for å snakke.

programme.title: Strong Medicine
programme.desc: Fra 2002. En gammel barndomsvenn ber Lu om hjelp når moren blir syk, og Andy er fast bestemt på å hjelpe en ung kvinne med å overvinne en potensielt invalidiserende sykdom for å kvalifisere seg til ROTC.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Fra 2025. Et kung fu-vidunderbarn trener med to legender for å møte en ny rival i en episk kampsportduell.

programme.title: Ender på eventyr
programme.desc: Fra 2023. En andefamilie ledet av en engstelig stokkand legger ut på sin første migrering, som blir full av eventyr og farer.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Fra 2023. David mot Goliat-historien basert på den vanvittige og sanne historien om gjengen som snudde Wall Street på hodet, og ble rike ved å gjøre GameStop til verdens heteste selskap.

programme.title: Challengers
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Eks-tennisspilleren Tashi har gjort ektemannen Art til en tennisstjerne. Nå er han ute av form, og hun melder ham på en Challenger-turnering, der han møter en utfordrer med bånd til dem begge.

programme.title: Paddington i Peru
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Den marmelade-elskende bjørnen går seg vill i jungelen i et spennende eventyr. Med Brown-familien på slep følger en spennende reise når et mysterium kaster dem inn i en uventet eskapade gjennom regnskogen i Amazonas og opp til Perus fjelltopper.

programme.title: The Last Showgirl
programme.desc: Fra 2024. En glamorøs danserinne må planlegge framtida når forestillingen hennes brått stenger etter 30 år.

programme.title: White Bird
programme.desc: Fra 2023. Historien om Sara, en ung jødisk jente i det nazi-okkuperte Frankrike i begynnelsen av andre verdenskrig, og om hvordan gutten hun og klassekameratene skyr, blir hennes redningsmann og beste venn.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Den brutale opprinnelseshistorien til Marvels ikoniske skurk Kraven, en mann med et komplekst forhold til sin hensynsløse far, som blir verdens beste jeger.

programme.title: Guns Up
programme.desc: Fra 2025. Ray, en tidligere politimann, hengiven ektemann og far, lever et farlig dobbeltliv som håndlanger for mafiaen. Idet han endelig er i ferd med å forlate ”Familien” og realisere drømmen om å åpne en diner, går den siste jobben hans fryktelig galt.

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: Fra 2023. En tidligere basketballtrener blir beordret av retten til å trene et lag med spillere med funksjonsnedsettelser. Han innser snart at til tross for hans skepsis, kan laget sammen nå lenger enn de noen gang hadde forestilt seg.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Fra 2025. Simon, en ung mann som sliter med psykisk sykdom, blir overbevist om at han har været vitne til en bortføring.

programme.title: Det ender med oss
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Lily møter nevrokirurgen Ryle og tror hun har funnet den rette. Men ting begynner å endre seg når hennes første kjærlighet dukker opp i livet hennes igjen. Basert på romanen av Colleen Hoover.

programme.title: Challengers
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Eks-tennisspilleren Tashi har gjort ektemannen Art til en tennisstjerne. Nå er han ute av form, og hun melder ham på en Challenger-turnering, der han møter en utfordrer med bånd til dem begge.

programme.title: Maracuda
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Maracuda, sønn av en stammeleder, strever med å leve opp til farens forventninger. For å bevise sitt mot drar han inn i en mystisk skog, hvor han møter Tink – en magisk fugl. Sammen begir de seg ut på utrolige eventyr i steinalderens skoger.

programme.title: Origin
programme.desc: Fra 2023. Hjemsøkt av sorg og kjærlighet reiste Isabel Wilkerson over kontinenter og fremmede kulturer for å skrive bestselgerromanen Caste. Et kritikerrost drama om historiens mysterier og kjærlighet.

programme.title: Bad Genius
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Lynn og vennene hennes "hjelper" andre elever med eksamen. Ettersom jukse-ringen utvides, får Lynn sitt livs mulighet: Hun kan hjelpe hundrevis av elever å jukse, og dermed gi langfingeren til hele utdanningssystemet i USA.

programme.title: You Gotta Believe
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Basert på den sanne historien om et ungt baseball-lag som trosset oddsen og kjempet seg hele veien til Little League World Series.

programme.title: Swimming Home
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Joe og Isabel gjør et siste forsøk på å lappe sammen ekteskapet sitt når de reiser til sitt solrike feriehus. Plutselig finner de en naken fremmed i bassenget, og når Isabel inviterer henne til å bli, blir spenningen i tilværelsen tøyd enda

programme.title: Hell Of A Summer
programme.desc: Fra 2023. En maskert morder terroriserer lederne på Camp Pineway i denne sommerleir-skrekkkomedien.

programme.title: The Long Game
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Skolens inspektør JB Peña flytter til Del Rio i Texas, og drømmer om medlemskap i den helhvite countryklubben. Avvist på grunn av hudfargen knytter han bånd til unge latinamerikanske caddier med egen bane.

programme.title: Goodrich
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Kunsthandleren Andy Goodrichs liv forandrer seg da hans unge kone begynner på et 90-dagers avvenningsprogram og samtidig truer ham med skilsmisse.

programme.title: Champions

programme.desc: Fra 2024. «The Fabulous Four» er en løssluppen komedie om en gjeng gode venner som reiser til Key West i Florida for å være brudepiker i overraskelsesbryllupet til deres beste college-venninne Marilyn.

programme.title: The Unholy Trinity
programme.desc: Fra 2024. I den avsidesliggende byen Trinity utløser skjulte hemmeligheter en bølge av vold når en ung mann vender tilbake for å kreve arven sin.

programme.title: Off the Grid
programme.desc: Fra 2025. Når et korrupt firma vil gjøre en vitenskapsmanns teknologi til et våpen, forlater han sivilisasjonen for å beskytte menneskeheten.

programme.title: Swimming Home
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Joe og Isabel gjør et siste forsøk på å lappe sammen ekteskapet sitt når de reiser til sitt solrike feriehus. Plutselig finner de en naken fremmed i bassenget, og når Isabel inviterer henne til å bli, blir spenningen i tilværelsen tøyd enda

programme.title: Hell Of A Summer
programme.desc: Fra 2023. En maskert morder terroriserer lederne på Camp Pineway i denne sommerleir-skrekkkomedien.

programme.title: You Gotta Believe
programme.desc: Fra 2024. Basert på den sanne historien om et ungt baseball-lag som trosset oddsen og kjempet seg hele veien til Little League World Series.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: Fra 2010. Fra 2010. Tror du på den store kjærligheten? Sophie er på ferie med sin italienske kjæreste i Verona – Romeo og Julies hjemby – når hun snubler over et støvete kjærlighetsbrev, skrevet for 50 år siden.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Fra 1999. For hva skal man egentlig si når man plutselig står ansikt til ansikt med et av de mest berømte menneskene i verden?

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Fra 2017. En jente vokste opp med en utradisjonelle kunstnermor og alkoholiserte far. Da hun flytter til New York som voksen, anklager foreldrene henne for å svikte verdiene de lærte henne som barn.

programme.title: Stolthet og fordom
programme.desc: Fra 2005. Når velstående Mr. Darcy flytter inn i nabolaget blir det oppstyr i Bennett-familien. Mrs. Bennett er sikker på at en av hennes fem døtre kommer til å kapre den rike, unge aristokratens hjerte.

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Tony Lip blir hyret til å kjøre dr. Don Shirley, en svart pianist i verdensklasse, på konsertturné fra Manhattan til sørstatene. På turen opplever de rasisme, men også menneskelighet og humor.

programme.title: Thank You For Smoking
programme.desc: Fra 2005. Nick Naylor har hva som kan sies å være en umulig jobb-beskrivelse. Han arbeider som lobbyist og pressetalsmann for selskapet Big Tobacco, og oppgaven hans er å promotere sigaretter og røyking i en tid hvor helsefarene er allemannsviten.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Fra 2019. En rik krimforfatter blir funnet død, og detektiven Benoit Blanc tar saken. Både familie og staben er mistenkte, og Blanc må manøvrere gjennom en labyrint av løgner for å avdekke sannheten.

programme.title: Man on a ledge
programme.desc: Fra 2012. Nick Cassidy var en ærlig politimann. Nå sitter han i fengsel, dømt for en forbrytelse han ikke har begått. I desperasjon tar han den første muligheten han ser for å rømme.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Fra 2019. Adelaide plages av et traume fra fortiden og er bekymret for sin familiens sikkerhet. Når familiens dobbeltgjengere dukker opp utenfor huset deres, blir det starten på et forferdelig mareritt.

programme.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
programme.desc: Fra 2017. En iskald skildring om forbrytelser og straff i et gåtefullt miljø. Når en familiefar tar en ung gutt under sine vinger, raser familien sammen. Det som ikke blir sagt, får ekstraordinære konsekvenser.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Fra 2015. Ana er en uerfaren college-student som har fått i oppgave å intervjue den gåtefulle milliardæren Christian Grey. Men det som begynner helt forretningsmessig, blir raskt til en ukonvensjonell romanse.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: Fra 2010. Mødrene Nic & Jules hadde den perfekte familien... helt til de møtte mannen som gjorde det hele mulig. De får seg et sjokk når husets to tenåringer oppsøker sæddonoren som er deres biologiske far.

programme.title: Stolthet og fordom
programme.desc: Fra 2005. Når velstående Mr. Darcy flytter inn i nabolaget blir det oppstyr i Bennett-familien. Mrs. Bennett er sikker på at en av hennes fem døtre kommer til å kapre den rike, unge aristokratens hjerte.

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Tony Lip blir hyret til å kjøre dr. Don Shirley, en svart pianist i verdensklasse, på konsertturné fra Manhattan til sørstatene. På turen opplever de rasisme, men også menneskelighet og humor.

programme.title: Thank You For Smoking
programme.desc: Fra 2005. Nick Naylor har hva som kan sies å være en umulig jobb-beskrivelse. Han arbeider som lobbyist og pressetalsmann for selskapet Big Tobacco, og oppgaven hans er å promotere sigaretter og røyking i en tid hvor helsefarene er allemannsviten.

programme.title: En del av mitt hjerte
programme.desc: Fra 2019. 35 år gamle Isabella er en vellykket forretningskvinne. Når hun drar hjem for å feire farens 60-årsdag, føler hun seg som en vinner, den eneste fra den gamle skolegjengen som har gjort det veldig bra.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Fra 2023. David mot Goliat-historien basert på den vanvittige og sanne historien om gjengen som snudde Wall Street på hodet, og ble rike ved å gjøre GameStop til verdens heteste selskap.

programme.title: After
programme.desc: Fra 2019. Tessa Young har alltid planlagt livet i lang tid fremover, men så møter hun en barsk gutt som heter Hardin, med for mange tatoveringer og piercinger, og han knuser alle planene hennes.

programme.title: The House with a Clock in Its Walls
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Foreldreløse Lewis flytter inn hos sin onkel, i et hus fullt av mystikk og hemmeligheter. I veggene har en ond trollmann skjult en klokke, som ingen vet hva gjør, bare at det er noe farlig.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Fra 2019. Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.title: Suite Française
programme.desc: Fra 2014. Den tyske okkupasjonsmakt har inntatt Frankrike. Året er 1940. I en idyllisk landsby er alt kaos, og det lille samfunnet forsøker å ta seg av flyktningstrømmen og trusselen fra de tyske styrker.

programme.title: Man on a ledge
programme.desc: Fra 2012. Nick Cassidy var en ærlig politimann. Nå sitter han i fengsel, dømt for en forbrytelse han ikke har begått. I desperasjon tar han den første muligheten han ser for å rømme.

programme.title: Us

programme.title: Dumb Money

programme.title: After
programme.desc: Fra 2019. Tessa Young har alltid planlagt livet i lang tid fremover, men så møter hun en barsk gutt som heter Hardin, med for mange tatoveringer og piercinger, og han knuser alle planene hennes.

programme.title: Sonja
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Sonja er filmen om Sonja Henie, tidenes største kunstløper, som bestemmer seg for å dra til Hollywood i 1936 og bli filmstjerne.

programme.title: The Brothers Bloom
programme.desc: Fra 2008. Bloom-brødrene, verdens beste svindlere, har bestemt seg for å trekke seg tilbake, men ikke før et siste romantisk eventyr. Målet deres er en vakker arving som de reiser verden rundt med.

programme.title: After We Collided
programme.desc: Fra 2020. I denne oppfølgeren, basert på den verdensomspennende bestselgeren After, følger vi Tessa i hennes smertefulle brudd og tiden etterpå. Vil kjærligheten overvinne fortiden?

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Fra 2013. Jack bor og patruljerer i skyene langt over jordens overflate, men tilværelsen hans forandres totalt når han redder en vakker fremmed fra et styrtet romskip.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Venninnene Audrey og Morgan bor sammen i L.A. når Audreys ekskjæreste plutselig dukker opp. Med en gjeng leiemordere i hælene drar han dem inn i en internasjonal konspirasjon på liv og død.

programme.title: Stalker
programme.desc: Fra 2018. Da hun en dag finner en gjenglemt håndveske på t-banen er det opplagt for Frances at hun må finne eieren og returnere den. Vesken viser seg å tilhøre Greta, en eksentrisk fransk pianolærer.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Fra 2019. Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, unlikely heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.desc: Police hunting for a serial kidnapper are helped when a victim manages to escape for the first time.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Multiple lives intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away.

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson makes a splash and Time Lord Christopher Eccleston swaps the Tardis for the Suzuki Liana.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio of presenters give their moms a chance to shine as they preview a range of small cars.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Trip back to the swinging 60s when the Aston Martin DB5 and the Jaguar E-Type contributed to Cool Britannia.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: With Jeremy in the McLaren SLR and Richard and James on a boat, who will make it from London to Oslo first

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Which is faster - man or machine? The Top Gear team aim to find out.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team heads to Iceland with a trio of convertibles - the Audi TT, Nissan 350Z and Chrysler Crossfire.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy gives his verdict on BMW's new M5, while Richard and James try their hand at road-testing.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The latest off-road toys, the world's fastest four door saloon, and a 4x4 driving across a lake!

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Does driving a Lambourghini Murcielago roadster give you the same kick as 12 angry bulls?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Contains discriminatory language. The team try to prove the hatchbacks of their youth were better than modern equivalents.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The boys test Italian sports cars, review military maneuvers and take a trip to Belgium.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: A road trip to the Ukraine ends with a journey through the nuclear wasteland of Chernobyl.

programme.title: The Bank Job
programme.desc: In 1971 London, a car dealer and his gang of thieves break into a bank vault and find far more than cash and jewelry.

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: Spending the summer at a Catskills resort with her family, Frances "Baby" Houseman falls in love with the camp's dance instructor, Johnny Castle, which changes many things for everyone in the Houseman family.

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: Mia (Emma Stone), an aspiring actress, and Sebastian (Ryan Gosling), a dedicated jazz musician, are struggling to make ends meet in a city known for crushing hopes and breaking hearts.

programme.title: Buffalo 66
programme.desc: Seeking parental approval and revenge on the man who jailed him, a newly released convict involves a teen in his schemes.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie police officer (Channing Tatum) who once killed a pair of junkies in his youth remains haunted by the incident.

programme.title: Magic Mike
programme.desc: A male stripper takes a newcomer under his wing and instructs him in the fine arts of partying, picking up women and making plenty of money.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: After a successful mission to free a Chinese hostage, a highly trained operative (Gina Carano) is betrayed and left for dead by someone in her own agency.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: Our hosts set out to discover what Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: The show returns with a high-octane race to Monte Carlo. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson reports on a collaboration between Mercedes-Benz and McLaren. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: The Top Gear presenters are given the challenge of buying a car for under £100. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: Can you drive from London to Edinburgh and back in an Audi A8 on one tank of gas? Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: The boys head to the beach to race a Jaguar, Porsche and BMW. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson casts his critical gaze over the Nissan Cube. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: Richard and James try mini-cabbing and Jeremy tests the Spyker C8 Spyder. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: James May tests the Maserati Quattroporte. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: The boys head to the Isle of Harris to road-test some Cabriolets. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Top Gear UK

programme.title: Top Gear UK
programme.desc: Jeremy works out an innovative way to get hold of a Ferrari Enzo F60. Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Warm Bodies
programme.desc: After a highly unusual zombie saves a still-living girl from an attack, the two form a relationship that sets in motion events that might transform the entire lifeless world.

programme.title: The Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Two unseen scientists manipulate the gory goings-on at a backwoods cabin inhabited by a group of unsuspecting college friends (Kristen Connolly, Chris Hemsworth, Anna Hutchison).

programme.title: Scream 4
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: On June 4, 1942, the Japanese navy plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: During World War II's Battle of Okinawa, U.S. Army medic Desmond Doss (Andrew Garfield) braves bullets, grenades and snipers while single-handedly evacuating the wounded from behind enemy lines.

programme.title: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: Members (Jeremy Renner, Anthony Mackie, Brian Geraghty) of a bomb-disposal unit in Baghdad face increasingly perilous situations as their tour-of-duty winds down.

programme.title: Sangat Tidak Biasa
programme.desc: Program ini menghadirkan kompilasi informasi berbagai macam issue dan topik yang akan dibahas dari berbagai sisi dan dipaparkan oleh penyulih suara.

programme.title: Kokom - Kompilasi Komedi
programme.desc: Program yang berisikan kompilasi video-video lucu yang viral di sosial media.

programme.title: Terang Kasih
programme.desc: Siraman rohani Kristen yang berkaitan dengan kehidupan untuk mendekatkan diri kepada Tuhan Yesus Kristus. Program ini akan dibagi menjadi beberapa bagian, antara lain kesaksian, renungan, serta konseling yang akan dipandu oleh dua orang host

programme.title: Movinesia
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang Menghadirkan sederet film pilihan untuk menemani aktivitas Anda dengan dimeriahkan oleh para pemain & artis papan atas berbakat, dengan cerita ringan seputar kehidupan remaja.

programme.title: International Big Match ; United State Of America (Usa) Vs Belgium
Omar & Hana
programme.desc: Omar & Hana adalah serial animasi anak bergenre hiburan pendidikan dengan tokoh kakak-beradik yang bahagia, ingin tahu, dan penuh kasih. Mereka menarik teman-teman di seluruh dunia ke dunia mereka yang menakjubkan.

programme.title: Ultraman Taiga The Movie: New Generation Climax
Cai Yoo
programme.desc: Program hiburan yang edukatif yang disajikan bagi penonton anak-anak, dipandu oleh seorang host yang akan mendatangi sekolah-sekolah untuk mengajak siswa bermain sambil belajar bersama.

programme.title: Abrakadabra
programme.desc: Abrakadabra merupakan sebuah reality show yang menghadirkan hiburan street magician, di mana para 'Pesulap' akan memberikan keajaiban dengan trik-trik rahasia yang memukau setiap mata di sekitar area publik.

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy & The Lemmings merupakan animasi yang menceritakan tentang seekor beruang grizzly yang bernama Grizzy dan sekawanan leming yang selalu ingin "bermain" dengan Grizzy setiap harinya sehingga banyak cerita dan petualangan yang menarik dari mereka.

programme.title: Si Kapal Selam Kecil : Penyelamatan Naga Samudra
Boba - Bombastis Banget
programme.desc: BOBA 'BOMBASTIS BANGET' merupakan program yang berisi informasi ringan yang menyajikan video-video bombastis yang viral, lucu, dan unik dari sosial media. Bisa berupa video kejadian yang tidak biasa ataupun video yang sedang viral.

programme.title: Check In - Check Informasi
programme.desc: Program yang menyajikan fakta-fakta unik tentang fenomena serta isu terkini yang terjadi di dunia melalui video-video yang bersumber dari media sosial dan dipaparkan oleh Voice Over yang unik.

programme.title: Obral - Obrolan Viral
programme.desc: Obral 'Obrolan Viral' merupakan program informasi yang dipandu oleh dua host untuk menyajikan berita terkini, video viral dan membahas hal-hal unik yang dibicarakan publik secara santai dan unik dengan format semi podcast ala radio show.

programme.title: International Big Match : United State Of America (USA) Vs Belgium
Di Ujung Rindu
programme.desc: Program Reality Show yang mengangkat kisah seseorang atas kerinduannya terhadap orang terkasih dan memiliki harapan dapat bertemu serta mengenang momen indah kebersamaan mereka.

programme.title: Cahaya Bagi Negeri
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang membahas berbagai isu hangat yang sedang ramai diperbincangkan masyarakat, dikupas dari sudut pandang spiritual dan nilai-nilai kerohanian.

programme.title: Besti - Best Informasi
programme.desc: Program TV berjenis informasi documentary yang menyajikan informasi-informasi terbaik dan dipaparkan oleh VO ( Voice Over ). Setiap segmen menampilkan informasi terbaik yang sangat informatif

programme.title: Movinesia
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang Menghadirkan sederet film pilihan untuk menemani aktivitas Anda dengan dimeriahkan oleh para pemain & artis papan atas berbakat, dengan cerita ringan seputar kehidupan remaja.

programme.title: Ustadz On The Road
programme.desc: Program religi yang dipandu oleh seorang host dan Ustadz yang akan memberikan kajian islami dengan treatment on the road disertai dengan study kasus.

programme.title: Riko The Series
programme.desc: Animasi lokal yang mengangkat keseharian seorang anak bernama Riko bersama sahabat robotnya, Q110 untuk menemukan dan mempelajari hal-hal baru disekitarnya. Q110 bertugas menjelaskan kepada Riko hal-hal baru yang mereka temukan.

programme.title: Marsupilami
programme.desc: Masih bersama HECTOR dantantenya, DIANE, dan sahabatnya, Marsupilami dan keluarganya! Bekerja sama menggagalkan semua rencana Felicia untuk mengubah Hutan Tropis Palombia menjadi Kota Megapolis Devort.

programme.title: Bread Barbershop
programme.desc: Bread, seorang tukang cukur jenius, memecahkan masalah penampilan dengan keterampilan memotong rambutnya yang briliant. Sekarang dia hadir untuk memecahkan masalah para bintang di Bakery Town.

programme.title: Boboiboy Galaxy
programme.desc: BoBoiBoy Galaxy merupakan sebuah kisah tentang robot-robot Power Sphera yang dibuat untuk memberikan kekuasaan besar kepada pemiliknya.

programme.title: Blox Buster
programme.desc: BLOX BUSTER adalah program entertainment yang menghadirkan keseruan bermain di dunia ROBLOX, platform game populer dengan jutaan kreasi dari komunitas global, penonton diajak menjelajahi berbagai dunia virtual.

programme.title: Tawa Satwa
programme.desc: Program yang menampilkan kompilasi video lucu hewan yang viral di media sosial dan di-react secara kekinian oleh voice over talent dengan karakter beragam yang akan menambah kelucuan.

programme.title: Boboiboy
programme.desc: Sebuah program animasi yang mengisahkan Boboiboy dan teman-temannya yakni Gopal, Ying, dan Yaya yang masing-masing memiliki kekuatan super.

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: Sebuah program animasi yang menceritakan seorang anak laki-laki bernama Amato dalam menemukan sebuah pesawat ruang angkasa penjara berisi robot-robot jahat yang telah jatuh ke bumi.

programme.title: Ijin, Ndan !
programme.desc: Ijin, Ndan adalah program crimetainment yang menggabungkan informasi seputar kejahatan dan kriminalitas dengan sketsa komedi situasional yang berlatar di ruang interogasi atau kantor polisi.

programme.title: Lensa Indonesia Malam
programme.desc: Program berita yang menghadirkan informasi terkini, rangkuman peristiwa yang terjadi dari malam hingga dini hari dengan dua segmen khusus, yaitu Lensa Dunia dan Lensa Arena yang membahas berbagai informasi olahraga di Indonesia maupun mancanegara

programme.title: Terkepo-Kepo
programme.desc: Program informasi dokumenter, menyajikan berbagai informasi yang dekat dengan kehidupan sehari-hari dan dibahas dari berbagai sudut pandang disertai dengan pemaparannya.

programme.desc: Program yang menampilkan kompilasi video lucu hewan yang viral di media sosial dan di-react secara kekinian oleh voice over talent dengan karakter beragam yang akan menambah kelucuan.

programme.title: Boboiboy
programme.desc: Sebuah program animasi yang mengisahkan Boboiboy dan teman-temannya yakni Gopal, Ying, dan Yaya yang masing-masing memiliki kekuatan super.

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: Sebuah program animasi yang menceritakan seorang anak laki-laki bernama Amato dalam menemukan sebuah pesawat ruang angkasa penjara berisi robot-robot jahat yang telah jatuh ke bumi.

programme.title: Ijin, Ndan !
programme.desc: Ijin, Ndan adalah program crimetainment yang menggabungkan informasi seputar kejahatan dan kriminalitas dengan sketsa komedi situasional yang berlatar di ruang interogasi atau kantor polisi.

programme.title: Lensa Indonesia Malam
programme.desc: Program berita yang menghadirkan informasi terkini, rangkuman peristiwa yang terjadi dari malam hingga dini hari dengan dua segmen khusus, yaitu Lensa Dunia dan Lensa Arena yang membahas berbagai informasi olahraga di Indonesia maupun mancanegara

programme.title: Terkepo-Kepo
programme.desc: Program informasi dokumenter, menyajikan berbagai informasi yang dekat dengan kehidupan sehari-hari dan dibahas dari berbagai sudut pandang disertai dengan pemaparannya.

programme.title: Barakallah
programme.desc: Ceramah islami penuh makna.

programme.title: Asmara Gen Z
programme.desc: Sinetron yang dibintangi oleh PARA GEN-Z. Dengan cerita dan suasana yang identik dengan GEN-Z.

programme.title: Defying Gravity: The Curtain Rises On Wicked
Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
Model Family
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga dengan orang tua tunggal pindah ke sebuah lingkungan baru yang kehidupan warganya tampak sempurna. Namun, ternyata semuanya tak seperti yang mereka kira.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Tujuh turis dengan masa lalu yang kelam terjebak di pabrik setan di pedesaan Belanda. Saat mereka diserang satu per satu karena dosa mereka, malam itu menjadi ajang pertarungan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda bernama Azlinda berjuang melawan pertempuran mistis yang telah menghantuinya sejak kecil. Meskipun Azlinda telah didiagnosis secara medis dengan "gangguan kecemasan", ia yakin bahwa gangguan yang telah menghantuinya sejak kecil itu terkait erat dengan sejarah hitam orang tuanya.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga dengan orang tua tunggal pindah ke sebuah lingkungan baru yang kehidupan warganya tampak sempurna. Namun, ternyata semuanya tak seperti yang mereka kira.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Terperangkap di sebuah rumah yang ditinggalkan, seorang pria tanpa nama mati-matian mencari petunjuk tentang bagaimana dia bisa sampai di sana. Jawabannya tersembunyi dalam serangkaian video viral yang mengganggu, yang masing-masing mulai menginfeksi pikirannya.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang seorang pria yang mendapat sepucuk surat gaib tentang prediksi kematiannya, pria lainnya tengah berduka atas kematian sang istri tercinta, serta tiga kakak beradik yang berselisih saat makan malam.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: Dunia Punya Cerita
programme.desc: Dunia Punya Cerita merupakan program informasi seputar tradisi kebudayaan dan aktifitas unik dari seluruh penjuru dunia.

programme.title: Bioskop TransTV - American Assassin
programme.desc: Dilatar belakangi rasa dendam karena kehilangan kekasihnya akibat sebuah serangan teroris dipantai. Mitch Rapp dan Stan Hurley berupaya menghentikan serangan teroris yang berusaha menciptakan perang dunia baru di wilayah Timur Tengah.

programme.title: Bioskop TransTV - L.A Confidential
programme.desc: Saat kasus korupsi meningkat pada tahun 1950-an di Los Angeles, tiga orang polisi dengan kepribadian berbeda menyelidiki serangkaian kasus pembunuhan dengan cara masing-masing.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Dua mahasiswa dari Universitas Kepolisian Nasional Korea memutuskan untuk bekerjasama dan menyelidiki sebuah insiden penculikan.

programme.title: A Year-End Medley
programme.desc: Dari cinta pertama yang canggung hingga jatuh hati pada seorang teman dan cinta yang telah lama terlupakan, empat belas individu yang dimabuk asmara dipertemukan di Hotel Emross pada Malam Tahun Baru.

programme.title: Cadaver
programme.desc: Hal-hal aneh mulai terjadi setelah sekelompok mahasiswa kedokteran membedah mayat.

programme.title: Marriage Blue
programme.desc: Marriage Blue adalah sebuah film komedi romantis yang menceritakan kemalangan yang dialami empat pasangan kekasih di pekan menjelang hari pernikahan mereka.

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Usai ditahbiskan, Pastor Do-woon mendengar pengakuan yang menguak hilangnya sang ibu 13 tahun lalu. Terbelenggu rahasia suci dan dendam, ia memilih memburu kebenaran.

programme.title: Veteran
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang jujur ​​mencari keadilan bagi orang biasa melawan segala rintangan. Seorang anak laki-laki kaya ingin membalas dendam pada polisi.

programme.title: Tazza: The Hidden Card
programme.desc: Keponakan Go-ni, Ham Dae Gil masuk dunia perjudian, namun ia dijadikan kambing hitam oleh bos dan temannya sendiri. Ia harus menanggung penderitaannya sendirian, hingga akhirnya Mi Na, perempuan yang disukainya membantu. Dae Gil bebas dan mulai mempelajari trik-trik berjudi untuk balas dendam.

programme.title: Hidden Face (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seong-jin, seorang konduktor, dan Su-yeon, seorang pemain cello, bertunangan. Su-yeon menghilang, meninggalkan sebuah video. Mi-joo menggantikan Su-yeon dan menjalin hubungan rahasia dengan Seong-jin. Mereka merasa diawasi saat ikatan mereka semakin dalam.

programme.title: 6/45: Lucky Lotto
programme.desc: Kegembiraan karena menang lotre tak berlangsung lama bagi sersan Chun-woo sebab secara tak sengaja tiket lotre tersebut melintasi Garis Demarkasi Militer. Ia harus mengendalikan dirinya dan menemukan jalan keluar!

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detektif Lin membentuk unit khusus untuk menangkap perampok motor dan sindikat di balik aksi pencurian di Foshan usai istrinya yang hamil ditabrak oleh perampok motor.

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Dalam lingkaran kejahatan narkoba, informan 'Ya-Dang' menjual informasi kriminal. Penjahat menggunakannya untuk mengurangi hukuman, sementara penegak hukum menggunakannya untuk penangkapan. Ya-Dang, polisi, dan jaksa membentuk segitiga kunci.

programme.title: My Lovely Angel
programme.desc: Seorang pria secara tak terduga harus bertanggung jawab untuk merawat seorang gadis buta dan tuli. Namun, hal ini ternyata mengubah hidup mereka berdua.

programme.title: Marriage Blue
programme.desc: Marriage Blue adalah sebuah film komedi romantis yang menceritakan kemalangan yang dialami empat pasangan kekasih di pekan menjelang hari pernikahan mereka.

programme.title: Marriage Blue
programme.desc: Marriage Blue adalah sebuah film komedi romantis yang menceritakan kemalangan yang dialami empat pasangan kekasih di pekan menjelang hari pernikahan mereka.

programme.title: Shades Of The Heart
programme.desc: Seorang novelis yang baru saja bercerai ingin menulis sebuah novel berdasarkan kehidupannya. Dalam prosesnya, ia bertemu orang-orang dengan cerita tentang masa lalu, kenangan dan kematian yang merubah pikirannya.

programme.title: Okay! Madam
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri tanpa sengaja terlibat dalam operasi penyelamatan sebuah pesawat yang dibajak dalam perjalanan mereka menuju ke Hawaii.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: Seorang astronaut terdampar di luar angkasa karena sebuah kecelakaan saat melakukan penerbangan luar angkasa. Mantan direktur pusat antariksa pun berusaha keras untuk membawanya kembali ke bumi dengan selamat.

programme.title: Tazza: The Hidden Card
programme.desc: Keponakan Go-ni, Ham Dae Gil masuk dunia perjudian, namun ia dijadikan kambing hitam oleh bos dan temannya sendiri. Ia harus menanggung penderitaannya sendirian, hingga akhirnya Mi Na, perempuan yang disukainya membantu. Dae Gil bebas dan mulai mempelajari trik-trik berjudi untuk balas dendam.

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Pembunuhan aneh setelah kecelakaan mobil membuat seorang polisi berpikir bahwa itu adalah ulah seorang pembunuh berantai. Ketika seorang gangster menjadi korban insiden serupa, ia bergabung dengan polisi tersebut.

programme.title: Bear Man (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Mitos Danggun menceritakan tentang saudara kembar Beruang Asia, yang dikelola oleh Institut Teknologi Pro-Korea Utara, yang menghilang setelah memakan bawang putih dan mugwort.

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Usai ditahbiskan, Pastor Do-woon mendengar pengakuan yang menguak hilangnya sang ibu 13 tahun lalu. Terbelenggu rahasia suci dan dendam, ia memilih memburu kebenaran.

programme.title: Veteran
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang jujur ​​mencari keadilan bagi orang biasa melawan segala rintangan. Seorang anak laki-laki kaya ingin membalas dendam pada polisi.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: Sejumlah kematian misterius yang terjadi di dalam pesawat memaksa sang pilot untuk meminta izin pendaratan darurat tanpa syarat.

programme.title: Okay! Madam
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri tanpa sengaja terlibat dalam operasi penyelamatan sebuah pesawat yang dibajak dalam perjalanan mereka menuju ke Hawaii.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Dua mahasiswa dari Universitas Kepolisian Nasional Korea memutuskan untuk bekerjasama dan menyelidiki sebuah insiden penculikan.

programme.title: Tazza: The Hidden Card

programme.title: A Man Of Reason (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Setelah menghabiskan satu dekade di penjara, seorang pembunuh bayaran mengetahui bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri dan hanya menginginkan kesempatan untuk menjalani kehidupan normal. Namun, mantan bos mafia-nya menginginkannya kembali dengan segala cara, mengirimkan para pembunuh bayaran tanpa ampun untuk mengejarnya.

programme.title: The Unfair (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Warga yang digusur dari rumah mereka di kawasan pembaruan kota yang telah ditentukan, berdemonstrasi menentang penggusuran tersebut. Polisi tiba dan berusaha mengakhiri demonstrasi. Namun, kematian terjadi dan menyebabkan masalah yang lebih besar.

programme.title: Return Of The Mafia (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: 10 tahun setelah "Marrying the Mafia 1". Ketiga J mendirikan perusahaan arsitektur dan menjadi pebisnis terkenal. Mereka memegang pena alih-alih kepalan tangan di tangan mereka, tetapi hal-hal buruk masih terjadi di sekitar mereka dan sekarang bahkan mengganggu anak-anak mereka.

programme.title: Juror 8
programme.desc: Film yang diangkat dari kisah nyata tentang delapan orang biasa dengan latar belakang berbeda yang dipilih sebagai juri pertama dalam persidangan kasus pembunuhan di Korea Selatan pada tahun 2008.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
Uri: The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Pasukan khusus tentara India melakukan operasi rahasia, membalas pembunuhan rekan tentara di pangkalan mereka oleh kelompok teroris.

programme.title: Mrs.
programme.desc: Richa, seorang penari terpelajar, mendapati dirinya dijodohkan dengan Diwakar, seorang dokter dalam keluarga yang sangat tradisional dan patriarkal. Sementara rutinitas rumah tangganya dimulai dengan kebahagiaan manis dari pernikahan baru, segalanya mulai berjalan ke selatan. Pekerjaan dapur yang membosankan dan banyak ketidaknyamanan dalam membersihkan, peralatan makan, dan keran yang bocor diserahkan kepada para wanita sementara para pria kebanyakan memanjakan diri dengan telepon atau yoga mereka. Keluarganya sangat patriarkal sehingga ibu mertuanya menyerahkan sikat gigi kepada ayah mertuanya, saat dia bersantai di beranda.

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Sanjay dan Aditi, dua orang dari kasta yang berbeda, jatuh cinta dan ingin menikah. Sadar bahwa kedua orang tua mereka tak akan merestuinya, keduanya pun menyusun sebuah rencana untuk meyakinkan mereka.

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: Rohan dan sahabatnya, Sunny, mempersiapkan perayaan pernikahan adik laki-lakinya. Namun, pertemuan yang tak sengaja antara Rohan dan Kuljinder, seorang gembong kriminal, memicu kekerasan selama acara tersebut.

programme.title: Thalaivi
programme.desc: J Jayalalithaa, seorang aktris yang produktif, didorong oleh mentornya, MG Ramachandran, untuk terjun ke dunia politik. Namun, ia menghadapi tantangan sulit berupa lingkungan politik yang didominasi laki-laki.
